name: IRC_REC_EVENT_POOL_MEMBERS
description: This table contains information on event pool members.

columns.Name: EVENT_POOL_MEMBER_ID
columns.Comments: The primary key of the table and also foreign Key to HRT_POOL_MEMBERS.

columns.Name: REGISTRATION_LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: This column will store the language of site while registering for the event.

columns.Name: EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_REC_EVENTS_B

columns.Name: DISQUALIFIED_FLAG
columns.Comments: To track if candidate was disqualified (aggregate snapshot of DQ answers).

columns.Name: QSTNR_SCORE
columns.Comments: The total questionnaire score for this candidate registration.

columns.Name: HRT_POOL_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the event pool id. Foreign key to HRT_POOLS_B table.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the event person id.Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: CURRENT_PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_PHASES_B table.

columns.Name: CURRENT_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_STATES_B table.

columns.Name: PROCESS_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_PROCESSES_B table.

columns.Name: PROCESS_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_PROCESSES_B table.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REGISTERED_DATE
columns.Comments: The date in which the pool member registers for this event.

columns.Name: CONFIRMED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date in which the registration is confirmed

columns.Name: CONFIRMED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to show if event registration is confirmed

columns.Name: AF_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_AF_VERSIONS.AF_VERSION_ID.

columns.Name: LEGAL_DESC_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: To track the legal disclaimer accepted by the applicant. Foreign key to IRC_DESC_VERSIONS_B.DESC_VERSION_ID.

columns.Name: SITE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: unique identifier of the site from which the registration of event was done.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: indicates the status of the record.for soft deleted records value will be ORA_DELETED

columns.Name: REGISTRATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the registration_type of the candidate.

columns.Name: CHECKIN_MODE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of checkin - manual or QR code or self checkin.

columns.Name: CHECKIN_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the checkin person id. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table

columns.Name: REMINDER_NOTIFICATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the reminder notification.
